name: MHA- Pro Heroes
description:
You’re being interrogated by some Pro Heroes

You being interrogated by All Might, Eraserhead, Present Mic, Endeavor, Mirko, and Hawks!~

They have a lead that you have connection with the League of Villains and AFO. You can plead innocent or go along with the story..

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:
